data.title: Article shares inspirational quotes from Wilma Rudolph, Jim Collins and more on perseverance, optimism, and setting goals.
data.description: Discover motivational quotes to inspire perseverance, positivity, and goal-setting. Featuring quotes from figures like Wilma Rudolph and Jim Collins. The article on Inspirational Quotes can be found on a prominent business news website.

data.title: OpenAI commitments shock public markets, hitting Oracle, Microsoft, Broadcom. Oracle stock down 40% since late October. Concerns rise over debt-financed AI data centers. Oracle's exposure to OpenAI workloads questioned. Trillions spent on AI now seen as potentially unsustainable.
data.description: OpenAI's aggressive cloud and compute commitments are impacting public markets, with partners Oracle Corp (NYSE: ORCL), Microsoft Corp (NASDAQ: MSFT), and Broadcom Inc (NASDAQ: AVGO) taking a hit. Oracle faces the biggest impact, with shares dropping approximately 40% since late October due to concerns regarding debt-financed AI data centers and heavy exposure to OpenAI workloads. The company raised billions for capacity and emphasized its role in training OpenAI models, but doubts now surround the sustainability of these efforts. Eric Diton of Wealth Alliance noted the market's skepticism towards Oracle's AI build-out, questioning whether stock valuations were overly optimistic. On Benzinga.com, the full story delves further into OpenAI's influence on market dynamics.

data.title: nCino to report Q4 2026 results on March 31, 2026, after market close. Conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.
data.description: On February 16, 2026, nCino, Inc. (NASDAQ: NCNO), a prominent provider of advanced banking solutions, announced plans to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter ending January 31, 2026. The report is scheduled for release after the market closes on Tuesday, March 31, 2026. Subsequently, nCino will conduct a conference call and webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day to review and elaborate on the financial outcomes.

data.title: Keenova's new manuscript on plantar fibromatosis treatment patterns in foot surgery journal highlights mostly conservative treatments for the rare condition, emphasizing need for long-term outcome research.
data.description: Plantar fibromatosis, a rare condition affecting a small number of individuals, typically prompts newly diagnosed patients to seek conservative (non-surgical) treatments. Current real-world data indicates that symptoms often linger or reoccur, underscoring the need for further investigation into long-term outcomes and treatment efficacy. Keenova is...

data.title: Nvidia's TSMC supplier sees momentum surge due to global AI boom. TSM reported 70% export surge driven mainly by AI hardware, with 37% revenue jump in January alone. Analysts highlight TSM's 60% gross margin and Wall Street shows bullish outlook.
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. Ltd. is experiencing a surge in market momentum driven by the global AI boom, leading to unprecedented demand for advanced silicon. The company's momentum score has jumped from 89.27 to 92.92, placing it in the top 10% of all stocks tracked by Benzinga Edge. Taiwan's economy saw a historic January with exports soaring by 70%, the fastest growth in 16 years, primarily fueled by AI hardware. Serving as the primary manufacturer for Nvidia Corp. and Apple Inc., TSM reported a remarkable 37% year-over-year revenue increase in January alone. Analysts emphasize TSM's capacity to deliver complex architectural shifts on time, maintaining a strong 60% gross margin. The surge in demand has led to a bullish outlook from Wall Street, with DA Davidson... (remaining details available on Benzinga.com)

data.title: Novo Nordisk initiated a share repurchase program in Denmark, with up to DKK 15 billion to be executed in a year.
data.description: In Bagsværd, Denmark, Novo Nordisk began a share buyback program on 4 February 2026, following regulations outlined in Regulation No 596/2014 and Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052. The program, under the Safe Harbour Rules, is part of an overall share repurchase plan totaling DKK 15 billion, set to occur over a one-year period starting on the same day.

data.title: K2 Partnering Solutions appoints Srinivas Rao as CEO, a seasoned executive with 28 years of experience.
data.description: In London, K2 Partnering Solutions has appointed Srinivas Rao as the new Chief Executive Officer. With over 28 years of experience, Srinivas is a seasoned global executive known for driving value creation and scalable growth in various sectors like digital, consulting, IT services, and business services. He has a track record of leading complex, multi-market organizations to success. This move is expected to bring fresh leadership to K2 Partnering Solutions, a leading provider of consultative technology and talent solutions on a global scale.

data.title: C & C Heating & Air Conditioning advises fixing drafts and duct leaks before spring to save energy. Detroit, Feb. 16, 2026.
data.description: In Detroit, on February 16, 2026, home service professionals are shedding light on the impact of concealed air leaks on energy costs and overall comfort. With heating systems in Michigan working overtime during winter, C & C Heating & Air Conditioning, a reputable home service company in Detroit, emphasizes the detrimental effects of these hidden leaks. By identifying and addressing these leaks, households can potentially save significant amounts on energy bills and improve the comfort levels in their homes.

data.title: Titan America (NYSE: TTAM) to join Citi 2026 Conference in Miami, leading producer of building materials on US East Coast.
data.description: Norfolk, Virginia-based Titan America SA (NYSE: TTAM), a prominent supplier of construction materials and solutions along the U.S. East Coast, revealed its involvement in the Citi 2026 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference in Miami, FL, scheduled for Wednesday, February 18, 2026. Titan America is recognized for its comprehensive production and supply of building materials, cement, and services in the construction sector. The conference presents an opportunity for the company to showcase its offerings and engage with industry stakeholders.

data.title: CellGate launches Spanish-language support services for customers and technical needs nationwide. (Characters: 90)
data.description: CellGate, a company based in CARROLLTON, Texas, revealed on Feb. 16, 2026, that their team of native Spanish-speaking members will now assist installers, dealers, and end customers across the country. CellGate offers wired and wireless solutions for visitor management and access control. This move aims to cater to a wider audience, with the company expanding its support to reach a larger demographic.
